scripts.build: bun run --filter './packages/*' build && bun run --filter './services/*' build && bun run --filter './apps/*' build
scripts.db:migrate:local: bunx wrangler d1 execute flareo --local --file=./drizzle/0000_init.sql && bunx wrangler d1 execute flareo --local --file=./drizzle/0001_drop_triggers.sql && bunx wrangler d1 execute flareo --local --file=./drizzle/0001_add_compiled.sql
